Toss an Anabar in a lunch box or bookbag & you can be confident your student is getting in 20g of Protein while savoring every single bite!
Bullet Point 3: 100% AUTHENTIC CHOCOLATE COATED: We believe in REAL INGREDIENTS at Anabar & when it comes to our Chocolate Coating we make no exceptions. Other brands will use a “chocolate hybrid” where they attempt to combine Chocolate & Protein to create a Frankenstein abomination that tastes nothing like Chocolate & everything like Disappointment. At Anabar we do no such thing, every piece of Chocolate is 100% Melt In Your Mouth Authentic!

Bullet Point 5: EASY ON THE STOMACH: We don’t sweeten Anabars with Sugar Alcohols or Strange Fibers. Instead, we take a more natural approach & use Real Honey to create the sweet taste that everyone loves! This way you get even more FLAVOR & spend less time with a stomach ache or indigestion!
Bullet Point 6: THE PERFECT SNACK OR MEAL REPLACEMENT: Whether you have a busy day & don’t have time to order food OR you’re looking for a quick High Protein Snack that you can stuff in your bag, Anabar is here to help! Each bar is coated in Chocolate & filled with your favorite guilty pleasure foods! Snack Time has never tasted this good!

catalog_content:
Item Name: Rhodiola Rosea Teabags, Pure Rhodiola Root Herbal Tea for Natural Energy & Clarity, Adaptogen Tea for Balance and Focus, Vegan & Unsweetened, 100% Natural Ingredients - 2 Gram Teabags - 32 Teabags
Bullet Point 1: Discover the Power of Rhodiola Rosea: Known as the “Golden Root,” Rhodiola Rosea has been cherished for centuries in Europe and Asia for its ability to support resilience and balance in challenging environments. This adaptogenic herb delivers a naturally earthy, slightly astringent flavor with hints of sweetness, creating a flavorful tea rooted in tradition and purpose.
Bullet Point 2: Pure and Authentic Ingredients: Ethnospot’s Rhodiola Rosea Tea Bags are a celebration of purity and excellence. Made with 100% natural golden root, free from fillers, additives, and artificial flavors, this tea offers a clean, guilt-free option. Vegan, unsweetened, and caffeine-free, it’s an ideal choice for individuals who seek a wholesome, premium herbal tea experience.
Bullet Point 3: Unmatched Flavor and Quality: Immerse yourself in the exquisite taste of Rhodiola Rosea—a bold herbal tea with an earthy, slightly astringent profile balanced by subtle natural sweetness. Harvested from pristine environments, this golden root tea reflects its rugged origins, offering a superior flavor experience that sets it apart from generic alternatives.
Bullet Point 4: Natural Benefits for Mind and Body: Rhodiola Rosea is renowned for its adaptogenic properties, helping to support natural energy, mental clarity, and focus. This powerful herb works to promote balance in both body and mind, making it an ideal choice for those looking to enhance their daily wellness and maintain a sense of calm throughout the day.
Bullet Point 5: Tea with a Purpose: Ethnospot’s Rhodiola Rosea Tea redefines what herbal tea can be. Crafted for those who value sustainability, authenticity, and purpose, this tea elevates your daily routine. Perfect for reflection, focus, or energy, it delivers clean, natural flavor with every sip, making it an essential choice for tea lovers who demand more.
Product Description: Discover the transformative power of Ethnospot’s Rhodiola Rosea Tea Bags, a premium herbal tea crafted to inspire a lifestyle of intentionality and excellence. At the heart of each tea bag is 2 grams of pure Rhodiola Rosea, also known as “Golden Root,” a revered herb sourced from pristine, rugged environments. Free from fillers, additives, caffeine, or artificial flavors, this tea offers an authentic experience designed for those who demand more from their daily rituals. Each sip embodies the essence of bold flavor, featuring an earthy, slightly astringent profile complemented by subtle natural sweetness. Whether you’re seeking a moment of calm or a refreshing start to your day, this tea seamlessly integrates into your lifestyle with its clean, invigorating taste. Sustainably crafted, Ethnospot’s tea bags are thoughtfully packaged in recyclable, eco-friendly pouches, reflecting our commitment to environmental responsibility. Each pouch contains 32 servings, delivering a full month of indulgence in a format that’s as practical as it is luxurious. With no sugar, caffeine, or artificial ingredients, this tea is the perfect choice for those who value mindful living and sustainable practices. Every detail, from the hand-selected golden root to the recyclable packaging, reflects Ethnospot’s dedication to providing a tea experience that aligns with your values. Ethnospot’s Rhodiola Rosea Tea Bags are more than just tea—they’re a statement of purpose. Perfect for quiet reflection, bursts of inspiration, or simply enjoying a moment of natural flavor, this tea offers a blend of quality and authenticity that elevates your everyday routine. Choose Ethnospot and embrace the bold, natural taste of Rhodiola Rosea—a tea crafted for those who refuse to settle for ordinary. Experience the difference of a tea that’s as intentional and extraordinary as you are.
Value: 48.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium herbal tea positioned as a high-end, specialty wellness product with strong emphasis on natural, adaptogenic benefits. The 'Golden Root' branding and detailed botanical imagery suggest a niche, health-conscious market willing to pay for perceived functional benefits. Eco-friendly packaging and vegan certification further elevate its premium positioning, while the 2g-per-teabag format may justify a higher price point compared to standard tea offerings. Absence of price cues but clear 'premium' and 'authentic' messaging implies a mid-to-high price range.
